tools.name: giftCard.createGiftCard
tools.description: Creates a GiftCard for a specific user

tools.name: giftCard.getGiftCardbyId
tools.description: Returns associated data for a specified giftcardId.

tools.name: giftCard.getGiftCardusingJson
tools.description: Returns the giftcards based on the cart data.

tools.name: transaction.cancelGiftCardTransaction
tools.description: Creates a cancellation in the transaction. Cancel a item reservation or create a refund.

tools.name: transaction.createGiftCardTransaction
tools.description: Register a new giftcard transaction and authorize the item reservation.

tools.name: transaction.getGiftCardTransactions
tools.description: Returns all transaction of a giftcard.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
